import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let doubled = sign * val * 2
        if first
          out = "#{doubled}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else
      if is_digit
        in_num = true
        val = b - 48
      else if is_minus
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        val = 0
      else if is_plus
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
